meta.title: Civic Sense is Going Viral — Join the Movement
meta.description: Share these facts and be a part of India's civic awakening on social media.

cards.title: Civic Sense = Respect
cards.text: Civic sense isn't about rules — it's about respecting your fellow citizens' right to clean, safe and peaceful shared spaces.

cards.title: Green India Challenge
cards.text: Plant one tree, adopt one park, clean one street. If 1 crore Indians take one civic action this month, India transforms overnight.

cards.title: Know Your Rights
cards.text: RTI, consumer rights, right to clean air — every Indian has powerful legal tools. The problem is most don't know they exist.

cards.title: The Statistics Are Alarming
cards.text: India loses ₹3 lakh crore annually to preventable causes — poor roads, pollution, and civic negligence. Civic sense is an economic issue.
